title: Astro-Mons ResourcePack
description: A resource pack that adds skins to custom skins for trainers. Dependant on the Run and Bun Trainer DP
body:
This is the Resource Pack that adds skins to the trainers of the Cobblemon: Run & Bun Trainer DP. 

https://modrinth.com/datapack/astro-mons-trainer-dp

**Gym Fights Added:**
(Space ark)
BROCK, ERIKA, MISTY, CHEREN, BUGSY, FLANNERY, OLYMPIA, WINONA, //ELITE 4: STEVEN, PHEOBE, JANINE, GIOVANNI, //CHAMP: ASTRO

(Apocalypse ark)
FALKNER, VIOLA, MORTY, SABRINA, MILO, GRIMSLEY, VALERIE, MAYLENE, //ELITE 4: GLACIA, DRAKE, WALLACE, WATTSON, //CHAMP: RED

Some additional skins of other popular trainers as well.
